creator: question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
text:
On 2009-11-25 03:00 +0000, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/getmail,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/140854 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140854

I approve the PR.

-- 
Linh Pham
